meta.title: WC Asia Demo Plugin
meta.author: Fellyph Cintra
meta.description: Demo plugin showcasing a testing pipeline with WordPress Playground — includes settings page, REST API endpoint, and shortcode.

steps.code:
<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

// Create a page with the shortcode
$page_id = wp_insert_post([
  'post_title'   => 'Greeting Page',
  'post_content' => '<!-- wp:shortcode -->[wc_asia_greeting]<!-- /wp:shortcode -->',
  'post_status'  => 'publish',
  'post_type'    => 'page',
]);

// Set as the front page
update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
update_option('page_on_front', $page_id);
